title: strychnos bicolor
intro: Strychnos bicolor, also known as the two-colored strychnine tree, is a species of plant in the Loganiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Strychnos bicolor include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as being used as a treatment for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Strychnos bicolor can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
